title: Analytics - Share Data
scenario: Log user consent choice for analytics tracking when the "Share Data" event is triggered via login or toggling the Share Data setting.
steps: 1. Trigger the 'Share Data' event by logging in or toggling the Share Data setting in App Settings > General > Account.
2. Observe that the user's consent choice for analytics tracking is logged.
3. Wait a few hours for the event count to update.
4. Navigate to the Firebase dashboard page.

5. Verify that the dashboard displays default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country and gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment, consent status, and screen name.
expected: The user's consent choice for analytics tracking is logged when the "Share Data" event is triggered. After a few hours, the event count updates. The Firebase dashboard page displays all default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country and gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment, consent status, and screen name.
